The Hyper Seed Launch:
Interviewing Experts
Module 6
The “Hyper” Seed Launch
• It has potential to create a serious business out of
thin air
• Shenanigans warming: use this ethically
• It’s pretty simple, but not necessarily easy
• You need some deal-making skills and be able to
talk to people
Leveraging Experts…
• This is about interviewing experts and tapping
into their resources
• It’s not hard to find experts that will agree to be
interviewed
• Book authors generally want exposure and are
open to being interviewed
• Being interviewed gives them exposure and
helps them sell more books
• You can search Amazon books for your topic
and find the contact info / website – send them
an email and ask
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Leveraging Experts…
• If you have an audience (or the potential for an
audience) they’d be interested in talking to you
• All experts want to sell more products
• The agreement is often done on a handshake
basis (you agree to give them the recorded
interview, and they release the rights to you – you
tell them what you’re going to do with it)
Interviewing Experts (aka the ”Product
Buildout”)
• Interview experts and record it
• You can ask the same series of questions to
each expert
• Get it transcribed
• Give them a copy of the interview
• Package the series of interviews into a product
• Do a product launch
The ”Product Buildout”
• Example: you interview six experts
• You have six audio files 40-60 minutes each
• Add an intro and an conclusion video or audio
• Get it transcribed
• Now you have a product
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
The ”Product Buildout”
• The effort is in identifying experts and
interviewing them
• Ask 12-15 questions for an hour of audio (6-8
could work)
• You can go to your list and ask what questions
they want you to ask the experts
• You could record the interview and go back and
edit
• Or you could to them live as a teleseminar or
webinar or a even an in-person interview
The ”Product Buildout”
• After you put the product together you ask the
experts to promote the launch as affiliates
• This will help build your list, and they’re making
money and getting exposure
• And you end up with product, a list, and a launch
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
